title: AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY VICTORIA REYES

chunks.text:
115 OG No. 47, 13147 (November 25, 2019)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 11450, August 28, 2019 ]

AN ACT CREATING A BARANGAY IN THE CITY OF DASMARIÃAS, PROVINCE OF CAVITE TO BE KNOWN AS BARANGAY VICTORIA REYES

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Creation of Barangay Victoria Reyes.

- There is hereby created a barangay in the City of Dasmariñas, Province of Cavite to be known as Barangay Victoria Reyes.

SEC. 2.

SEC. 3.

Conduct and Supervision of Plebiscite.

- The plebiscite conducted and supervised by the Commission on Elections (COMELEC) pursuant to Provincial Ordinance No. 2000-004 of the Sangguniang Panlalawigan of the Province of Cavite, which ratified the creation of Barangay Victoria Reyes as proclaimed by the Plebiscite Board of Canvassers on October 19, 2003 shall serve as substantial compliance with the requirement under Section 10 of Republic Act No. 7160, otherwise known as the "Local Government Code of 1991", as amended.

SEC. 4.

Incumbent Barangay Officials.

- The incumbent elected barangay officials of Barangay Victoria Reyes shall continue to hold office until their successors shall have been elected and qualified.

SEC. 5.

Public Infrastructure and Facilities.

- All public infrastructure and facilities existing therein at the time of the approval of this Act are hereby transferred without cost or compensation to and shall be administered by the new Barangay Victoria Reyes.

SEC. 6.

Internal Revenue Allotment Shares. â

Barangay Victoria Reyes shall entitled to the internal revenue allotment (IRA) share pursuant to Section 285 of the Local Government Code of 1991, as amended.

SEC. 7.

Effectivity.

- This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.)

VICENTE C. SOTTO III

President of the Senate

(SGD.)

GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was passed by the House of Representatives on May 20, 2019, amended by the Senate of the Philippines on June 3, 2019, and which amendments were concurred by the House of Representatives on June 4, 2019.

(SGD.)

MYRA MARIE D. VILLARICA

Secretary of the Senate

(SGD.)

DANTE ROBERTO P. MALING

Acting Secretary General House of Representatives

Approved: AUG 28 2019

(SGD.)

RODRIGO ROA DUTERTE

President of the Philippines
